title: What is Java & Why Learn It?
excerpt: Discover what Java is, where it is used, and why it remains one of the most in-demand programming languages.

title: Setting Up JDK & IntelliJ IDEA
excerpt: Step-by-step guide to install JDK 21 and set up IntelliJ IDEA for Java development on Windows and macOS.

title: Hello World: Your First Java Program
excerpt: Write and run your very first Java program. Understand the anatomy of a Java file — class, main method, and print statement.

title: How Java Compiles & Runs (JVM Explained)
excerpt: Understand the JVM, JRE, and JDK. Learn how Java goes from .java source code to running bytecode on any machine.

title: Primitive Data Types in Java
excerpt: Explore Java's 8 primitive types: int, long, double, float, char, boolean, byte, and short.

title: Strings & Wrapper Classes
excerpt: Learn how Strings work in Java, why they are immutable, and how Wrapper classes bridge primitives and objects.

title: Type Casting & Type Conversion
excerpt: Understand implicit (widening) and explicit (narrowing) type casting with practical code examples.

title: Constants with final Keyword
excerpt: Use the final keyword to declare constants in Java to prevent accidental value changes.

title: Arithmetic Operators
excerpt: Master +, -, *, /, %, ++, -- operators with real examples and edge cases like integer division.

title: Comparison & Logical Operators
excerpt: Use ==, !=, >, <, >=, <=, &&, ||, ! to compare values and build logical conditions.

title: Bitwise Operators
excerpt: Explore &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> operators for low-level bit manipulation in Java.

title: Operator Precedence & Expressions
excerpt: Understand the order in which Java evaluates operators and how to use parentheses to control expressions.

title: if / else if / else Statements
excerpt: Control program flow by making decisions with if, else if, and else blocks.

title: Switch Statements
excerpt: Use switch statements for multi-branch logic — including modern switch expressions from Java 14+.

title: for Loop
excerpt: Repeat code blocks with the classic for loop and the enhanced for-each loop for arrays and collections.

title: while & do-while Loops
excerpt: Learn the difference between while and do-while and when to choose each one.

title: break & continue
excerpt: Control loop execution with break to exit early and continue to skip an iteration.

title: Defining & Calling Methods
excerpt: Write reusable code with methods. Learn syntax, naming conventions, and how to call them.

title: Parameters & Return Types
excerpt: Pass data into methods with parameters and send results back with return types.

title: Method Overloading
excerpt: Define multiple methods with the same name but different parameter lists for flexible APIs.

title: Recursion
excerpt: Solve problems by having a method call itself. Learn with classic examples: factorial, Fibonacci, and tree traversal.

title: Classes & Objects
excerpt: Learn the foundation of OOP: define a class as a blueprint and create objects from it.

title: Constructors
excerpt: Initialize objects with constructors. Understand default, parameterized, and copy constructors.

title: Encapsulation & Access Modifiers
excerpt: Protect your data with private fields, getters, and setters. Understand public, private, protected, and default access.

title: Inheritance
excerpt: Extend classes to reuse and override behavior. Understand extends, super, and method overriding.

title: Polymorphism
excerpt: One interface, many forms. Learn method overriding (runtime) and method overloading (compile-time) polymorphism.

title: Abstraction & Interfaces
excerpt: Hide complexity with abstract classes and define contracts with interfaces. Know when to use each.

title: 5 VS Code Extensions Every Developer Needs in 2026
excerpt: Boost your productivity with these must-have VS Code extensions for modern web and backend development.

title: How to Stop Using These 10 Common English Phrases at Work
excerpt: These overused phrases make your writing sound weak. Here are smarter alternatives for professional English.

title: What is JavaScript & Where Does It Run?
excerpt: Understand JavaScript's role in the web: browser, Node.js, and beyond.

title: Setting Up: Browser DevTools & VS Code
excerpt: Your JS playground: use the browser console and set up VS Code with live reload.

title: Your First JavaScript Program
excerpt: Write your first script, understand console.log, and link JS to an HTML page.

title: How JavaScript Executes: Engine & Runtime
excerpt: What V8 is, how the call stack works, and the difference between the engine and runtime.

title: var, let, and const — What's the Difference?
excerpt: Understand hoisting, block scope, and when to use each variable declaration.

title: JavaScript Data Types
excerpt: String, Number, Boolean, null, undefined, Symbol, BigInt — and the typeof operator.

title: Function Declarations vs Expressions
excerpt: Hoisting, named vs anonymous functions, and when each form is useful.

title: Arrow Functions
excerpt: Concise syntax, implicit return, and how arrow functions handle `this` differently.

title: Callbacks & Callback Hell
excerpt: What callbacks are, why they lead to nested hell, and how Promises solve it.

title: Promises
excerpt: Create and chain Promises. Handle success with .then() and errors with .catch().

title: async / await
excerpt: Write async code that looks synchronous. Understand try/catch with await.

title: What is Python & Why Learn It?
excerpt: Python's philosophy, use cases (web, data, AI, scripting), and why it's beginner-friendly.

title: Installing Python & Setting Up VS Code
excerpt: Install Python 3.12+, set up VS Code, and run your first .py file.

title: Hello World in Python
excerpt: Your first Python script: print(), comments, and the Python REPL.

title: AI vs Machine Learning vs Deep Learning
excerpt: Clear definitions and the relationship between AI, ML, and Deep Learning — with real-world examples.

title: How ML Models Actually Learn
excerpt: Training, loss functions, and gradient descent explained without scary math.

title: What are LLMs? (GPT, Gemini, LLaMA)
excerpt: Large Language Models explained: how they're trained, what tokens are, and their limitations.

title: Prompt Engineering Fundamentals
excerpt: Write effective prompts: zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought, and system instructions.

title: Why Code Comments Matter
excerpt: Good comments explain WHY, not WHAT. Learn the minimal, effective commenting style.

title: Anatomy of a Great README
excerpt: What every README needs: title, description, install steps, usage, and contributing guide.

title: JavaScript vs Python in 2026 — Which Should You Learn First?
excerpt: Both are beginner-friendly and in high demand. Here's a clear breakdown to help you choose based on your goals.

title: How I Use AI Every Day as a Developer
excerpt: Practical ways to integrate Copilot, ChatGPT, and Gemini into your real development workflow without losing your skills.

title: Thinh test
